content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory can be reimagined as a recursive self-auditing system where the agent itself acts as the active curator of its own memory, rather than memory being a static storage layer controlled by an external active selection loop. This reframes the general concept of an agent from a task executor that uses memory as a tool to a memory-curating entity that actively evolves its own knowledge base to enable future task performance.
